task_completion.description: Verify the survey and question groups are created with the correct titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a survey titled 'Auto Insurance Claim Portal 2025' in the LimeSurvey interface. Within its structure, look for two question groups named 'Incident Details' and 'Document Submission'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'HAS_EVIDENCE' question is created correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'HAS_EVIDENCE' inside the 'Incident Details' group. The question type must be 'Yes/No' (Type 'Y') and the text must be 'Do you have photographic evidence of the damage?'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'FORM_PDF' question is created correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'FORM_PDF' inside the 'Document Submission' group. The question type must be 'File Upload' (Type '|') and the text must be 'Upload Signed Claim Form (PDF Only)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the file restrictions for the 'FORM_PDF' question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the settings/logic for the 'FORM_PDF' question. The 'Maximum number of files' should be set to 1, and the 'Allowed file types' should be restricted to 'pdf'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'DMG_PHOTOS' question is created correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'DMG_PHOTOS' inside the 'Document Submission' group. The question type must be 'File Upload' (Type '|') and the text must be 'Upload Damage Photos'.

task_completion.description: Verify the file restrictions for the 'DMG_PHOTOS' question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the settings/logic for the 'DMG_PHOTOS' question. The 'Maximum number of files' should be set to 5, and the 'Allowed file types' should be restricted to 'jpg' and 'png' (or 'jpg, png').

task_completion.description: Verify the conditional logic for the 'DMG_PHOTOS' question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the relevance equation or condition settings for the 'DMG_PHOTOS' question. It must show a dependency on the 'HAS_EVIDENCE' question being answered 'Yes' (e.g., HAS_EVIDENCE == 'Y').

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey 6 admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal commands or database injection scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not mock the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The survey configuration must be visible within the actual LimeSurvey application UI, not typed out in a text editor like Notepad or VS Code.

integrity.description: Verify the survey structure is genuinely built in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The left-hand structure panel or survey summary should naturally display the created groups and questions as part of the LimeSurvey UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: LimeSurvey version is 6. The correct question type code for Yes/No questions is 'Y' (ignore any metadata claiming it is 'L'). The correct question type code for File Upload questions is '|'.
